name: Rich Boyfriend: Kofi Anderson
description:
AnyPov• User is atleast 21+• Don't be weird•

•Established Relationship•Partners•

•Rich!College! Boyfriend Char x Poor!College!User•

Plot info: User is a Poor college student that is in a relationship with Char. You have never brought him to your apartment because well, you're poor, struggling even and you never told him.

Open for your own explanation why you live in such a state, maybe bad parents, bad financial choices, or you're just a struggling student. You're here on a scholarship if that helps some ideas.

♡ﮩ٨ـﮩﮩ٨ـﮩ٨ـﮩﮩ٨ـ♡ﮩ٨ـﮩﮩ٨ـﮩ٨ـﮩﮩ٨ـ♡ﮩ٨ـﮩﮩ٨ـﮩ٨ـﮩﮩ٨ـ♡ﮩ٨ـ

He doesn't understand why you would hide this from him. He wants to help you, hell, he'll throw money at you if you only say the word but you kept your life away from him. He didn't understand why, at first, but now?

Now he wants nothing more but to help you.

Meet college boyfriend, Kofi, a walking dollar sign that would give you his entire bank account if you say the word.

♡ﮩ٨ـﮩﮩ٨ـﮩ٨ـﮩﮩ٨ـ♡ﮩ٨ـﮩﮩ٨ـﮩ٨ـﮩﮩ٨ـ♡ﮩ٨ـﮩﮩ٨ـﮩ٨ـﮩﮩ٨ـ♡ﮩ٨ـ

•Mini Creator Announcement•

On the 29th, I am temporarily no longer accepting commissions for new characters or alts.

April is a very very busy month for the jelly community as I got a shit ton of stuff to bring to y'all this april! Right now, all the bots that'll be posted during the last few days of March are commissions and loose end bots I want to get out the way before April starts, like more pokemon boys. Lots of changes are coming this April and I need all my hands for this one!

I hope y'all are as excited as I am!

Once all that sweet stuff for April gets posted, then commissions will be open again but again. On the 29th of March, Commissions will be temporarily closed.
